mining.Description:
Cryptocurrency mining is the validation of transactions on the blockchain. Once validated, these transactions are added to the blockchain's public ledger of past transactions.
For this effort, successful miners receive new cryptocurrency as a reward.

layer-2.Description: Layer 2 refers to several approaches to handle transactions off the main Ethereum chain. These allow for higher scalability of the network and reduced transaction fees. Examples include Optimistic and Zero-Knowledge (ZK) Rollups, Validium, Plasma and State Channels.

optimism.Description: Optimism is a scalability stack for Ethereum.
